[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2017-01-21
[TITLE]: Aerial photos show large crowds at Women’s Marches across the country | Vox
[METADATA/INTRO]: Women from across the country have converged on Washington, DC, on Saturday for a massive rally to protest Donald Trump’s election and promote women’s rights. At the same time, there have been rallies organized in major — and not so...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Women from across the country have converged on Washington, DC, on Saturday for a massive rally to protest Donald Trump’s election and promote women’s rights. At the same time, there have been rallies organized in major — and not so major — cities across the country. 
 Aerial photos show large crowds at Women’s Marches across the country 
 Aerial photos and videos show massive crowds gathering all over the United States. Some of the biggest rallies so far have been in Los Angeles, Boston and Chicago. There have also been sizable crowds in cities from Ithaca, New York, to Park City, Utah, where the Sundance Film Festival is taking place. Here’s a roundup of some of the dramatic aerial photographs. I’ll update with more photos as the events continue.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Communities gather for nationwide 'No Kings' protests
[METADATA/INTRO]: 'We must speak up': Communities gather for nationwide 'No Kings' protests More than 3,000 "No Kings" protests were held nationwide Saturday. This was the third time this year that demonstrations, large and small, brought community members from around the country...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Thousands of people stood shoulder-to-shoulder on the Minnesota Capitol lawn and surrounding streets in St. Paul. Some held upside-down U.S. flags, historically a sign of distress. 
 The event's headliner was Bruce Springsteen, who performed “ Streets of Minneapolis.” He wrote the song in response to the fatal shootings of Renee Good and Alex Pretti by federal agents and in tribute to the thousands of Minnesotans who took to the streets over the winter to protest the Trump administration's aggressive immigration enforcement. 
 Video below: 'No Kings' protest in Florida 
 Before he launched into the song, Springsteen lamented Good and Pretti’s deaths but said people's continued pushback against U.S. Customs and Immigration Enforcement has given the rest of the country hope.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Mass. protests over death of George Floyd continue to draw hundreds
[METADATA/INTRO]: Massachusetts protests over death of George Floyd continue to draw hundreds Hundreds of demonstrators continued to gather in different communities throughout Massachusetts this weekend to protest the death of George Floyd....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Massachusetts protests over death of George Floyd continue to draw hundreds 
 Hundreds of demonstrators continued to gather in different communities throughout Massachusetts this weekend to protest the death of George Floyd. 
 On Sunday, hundreds gathered at City Hall Plaza in Boston and then marched to Boston Police Headquarters. Several speakers at City Hall Plaza called for defunding of the city's police department and police departments across the state of Massachusetts. 
 There was a large police presence during the march, with city, state and military officers blocking Massachusetts Avenue. 
 In Lawrence, the police chief addressed dozens of protesters Sunday afternoon and then had spoke with a small group of demonstrators outside Lawrence Police Headquarters in the evening.
